identity.name: Aveonel Global
identity.mission: Operations support service for Ontario coaches/consultants.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3 headings. Letter spacing: tight.

body.usage: Use for body text, UI elements, buttons.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2E5C55] text-white hover:bg-[#244A44] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all duration-300 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FDFBF7] border border-[#2E5C55] text-[#2E5C55] hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-medium transition-all duration-300
buttons.ghost: text-[#2E5C55] hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-300

cards.feature: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl border border-[#E5E5E0] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 group

inputs.default: bg-white border-[#E5E5E0] focus:border-[#2E5C55] focus:ring-[#2E5C55] rounded-lg px-4 py-3

textures.grain: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

hero.alt: Elegant desk with flowers, calm office atmosphere

consulting_2.usage: About or How It Works section

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for dark colors.
Avoid generic centered layouts; use asymmetry for interest.
Use glass-morphism with caution, prefer solid elegant surfaces.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Accessibility: Ensure high contrast text (WCAG AA).

instructions_to_main_agent.fonts: Install fonts using the provided commands. Configure Tailwind to use them.
instructions_to_main_agent.colors: Update tailwind.config.js with the provided palette.
instructions_to_main_agent.components: Use custom HTML/Tailwind for Marketing pages. Use Shadcn for Admin Dashboard and Forms.
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard: Keep the dashboard clean, minimalist, and light. No dark mode dashboard unless requested.
instructions_to_main_agent.animations: Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations. Stagger children for lists.
